members.name: plugin-hardener
members.role: Wraps plugin.ts init in try/catch + 5s timeout, uses Reporter for startup/failure toasts, returns degraded hooks on failure

members.name: hook-hardener
members.role: Wraps permissions.ts and activity-tracker.ts hooks in try/catch with Reporter so a hook throw never breaks tool execution

members.name: tool-hardener
members.role: Wraps all 9 tool execute() functions to return error message strings instead of throwing, so the LLM sees the error and can react
